full_text:
Feng Heng (Junda) 封衡 (君達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Heng (封衡), styledJunda (君達), was born in Longxi. Taoist Sage. Teacher of Zuo Ci. Taught him magics and path to longevity. Feng Heng may not have existed in history.
